title: Week 7 Overview
html:
Week 7 Overview

Day 31
1. Use of たform + り to express a list of actions
2. Grammar focus on the expression in たform＋あとで（after~; later)
3. Three new kanji: 時, 分, 半

Day 32
1. Verbs in ないform (negative)
2. Grammar focus on verbal form ないでください (please do not do)
3. Use of the particle は
4. Grammar focus on まだ＋Verb＋ないでください (please do not do it yet)
5. Katakana for vegetables and fruits

Day 33
1. Grammar focus on なければなりません (have to, must)
2. Grammar focus on なくてもいいです (do not have to)
3. Use of までに (by the time)
4. Use of the adverbs かならず (certainly) and ぜんぶ (all)
5. Three new kanji: 国, 火, 水

Day 34
1. Grammar focus on verbs in plain form
2. Grammar focus on verbs in plain form + から (because, since)
3. Grammar focus on verbs in plain form + けど (however; although)
4. Use of ちょっと
5. Katakana for entertainment and leisure words

Day 35
1. Verb in plain form + と思います (to think)
2. Grammar focus on the particles と (to quote) and について (regarding)
3. Use of どう to ask someone’s opinion
4. Three new kanji: 金, 土, 年
